center.name: 凱烏魯山
center.summary: 凱烏魯山是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Bar-throated apalis，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits forest and scrub in Southern and East Africa from southern and eastern parts of South Africa north as far as the Chyulu Hills in Kenya

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits forest and scrub in Southern and East Africa from southern and eastern parts of South Africa north as far as the Chyulu Hills in Kenya
